---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an addition or change to fomodynamics
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Use-case

What problem are you trying to solve? Describe the scenario first — what
you are simulating, controlling, or analyzing — before proposing an API
shape.

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of the change you'd like. Code sketches
welcome but optional.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you weigh? Why doesn't the current API cover
this?

## Scope

- [ ] Public surface (`fmd.*`) — needs API design + tests
- [ ] Internal infrastructure (`fmd.*` private modules) — implementation
      detail, no API impact
- [ ] Documentation only

## Additional context

Links to papers, related issues, or other libraries that solve a similar
problem.
